title: About
heading: About BarkinMad Studios
intro: Independent retro-inspired games and mobile apps built for iPhone and iPad.

sections.heading: Who We Are
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios is an independent software and game development studio based in the United Kingdom.
The studio focuses on creating retro-inspired arcade games, mobile apps, and simple digital experiences that are easy to pick up, enjoyable to replay, and built with care.

sections.heading: What We Make
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios develops a growing collection of iPhone and iPad apps, including retro arcade games and darts scoring tools.
list: ZXSnake - a retro-inspired snake arcade game.
ZXBrick - a classic brick-breaking arcade game.
ZXSpace - a retro space shooter inspired by arcade classics.
GameOfDarts - a darts scoring and statistics app.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For support, feedback, testing enquiries, or business questions, please contact support@barkinmad.studio.
